response.text:
OpenCode harvesting is now wired into the daemon with a new module that reads the local SQLite store, maps sessions to the repo via `session.directory`/`project.worktree`, and emits a gg event per assistant text part (no inactivity end detection). The schema doc is updated with the exact tables and extraction logic.

Changed files:
- `src/opencode.rs` (new OpenCode poller + state tracking)
- `src/daemon.rs` (start OpenCode poll thread)
- `src/main.rs` (register module)
- `schemas/opencode.md` (document storage, schema, mapping, extraction)

Key details implemented:
- Storage: `/Users/joe/.local/share/opencode/opencode.db` (override via `GG_OPENCODE_DB` or `OPENCODE_DB`)
- Event extraction: join `session`/`project`/`message`/`part`, filter `message.role == assistant` and `part.type == text`, emit per response
- State: `.git/gg/opencode.json` tracks last seen part time per session
- Polling controls: `GG_OPENCODE_POLL` (off to disable), `GG_OPENCODE_POLL_SECS`, `GG_OPENCODE_REPO`

If you want to validate end‑to‑end, I can run:
1) `cargo build`
2) Start daemon and confirm new events appear from recent OpenCode sessions

meta.session_title: OpenCode session harvesting plan in read-only mode
